dc.contributor.author: Jenkins, Alicia||Keech, Anthony
dc.description.abstract: The estimated sample size is 450. Demographics, clinical characteristics and outcomes measures will be available from patients with type 1 diabetes. All timepoints points (baseline, 6-week, 3-month, 6-month, 1-year, 2-year, 3-year assessments) will be included in the dataset.
dc.rights.other: Access can be requested via the Health Data Australia catalogue (https://researchdata.edu.au/health). A copy of the Data Sharing Policy can be found in https://rb.gy/bgrcq. For further information please contact the Health Studies Australian National Data Asset (HeSANDA) SHP-CTC node (hesanda.shp-ctcnode@sydney.edu.au).
dc.title: The Fenofibrate And Microvascular Events in Type 1 diabetes Eye (FAME 1 EYE) dataset
usyd.faculty: SeS faculties schools::Faculty of Medicine and Health::NHMRC Clinical Trials Centre
